section.heading: Authorization of appropriations

subsection.heading: In General.—
subsection.content: Subject to subsection (b), there is authorized to be appropriated to the corporation for operation and maintenance expenses $500,000 for each of fiscal years 2008 through 2017.

subsection.heading: Limitation.—
subsection.content: Any Federal funds made available under subsection (a) shall be matched on a 1-to-1 basis by non-Federal funds.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 111–11, title XIII, § 13006, Mar. 30, 2009, 123 Stat. 1452.)
